title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Delhi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions:
Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions!
